fields.label: Brusnika.LMS URL
fields.description: URL of your Brusnika.LMS instance (e.g. https://lms.yourcompany.com)

fields.label: Instructions
fields.options:
1. Go to Settings → My Profile → API Access and generate API keys for the admin account.
  2. Open your Brusnika.LMS admin panel.
  3. Navigate to Integrations → Frappe / ERPNext.
  4. Enter this Frappe URL, the API Key, and the API Secret.
  5. Click Connect — users and departments will sync automatically.
